28: class AssistantVocal:
29:     """
30:     Assistant vocal principal.
31:     Utilise des modules séparés pour l'audio, la conversation et les interfaces.
32:     """
33: 
34:     def __init__(
35:         self,
36:         settings: Settings,
37:         conversation_service: ConversationService,
38:         prompt_manager: PromptManager,
39:         tts_service: TTSService,
40:         wake_word_service: WakeWordService,

47:         self.settings = settings
48:         self.conversation_service = conversation_service
49:         self.prompt_manager = prompt_manager
50:         self.tts_service = tts_service
51:         self.wake_word_service = wake_word_service
52:         self.speech_recognition_service = speech_recognition_service
53:         self.llm_service = llm_service
54:         self.project_analyzer_service = project_analyzer_service
55:         self.system_monitor = system_monitor
56:         self.performance_optimizer = performance_optimizer
57: 
58:         self._is_running = False
59: 
60:         self.audio_pipeline = AudioPipeline(
61:             wake_word_service,

63:             tts_service,
64:             settings,
65:         )
66: 
67:         self.conversation_handler = ConversationHandler(

78:     def _setup_callbacks(self):
79:         """Configure les callbacks entre les modules"""
80:         self.audio_pipeline.set_wake_word_callback(self._on_wake_word)
81:         self.audio_pipeline.set_transcription_callback(self._on_transcription)
82: 
83:     def _on_wake_word(self):
84:         """Called when wake-word is detected"""
85:         logger.info("Wake-word détecté")
86:         self.speak("Je vous écoute")
87: 
88:     def _on_transcription(self, text: str):
89:         """Called when transcription is ready"""
90:         logger.info(f"Transcription: {text}")
91:         if not self._is_french_text(text):
92:             logger.warning(f"Texte，可能不是 français: {text}")
93:         response = self.conversation_handler.process_message(text)
94:         self.speak(response)
95: 
96:     def _setup_cleanup(self):
97:         atexit.register(self._cleanup)
98: 
99:     def _cleanup(self):
100:         if not self._is_running:
101:             return
102:         logger.info("Nettoyage des ressources...")
103:         self._is_running = False
104:         if hasattr(self, 'audio_pipeline'):
105:             self.audio_pipeline.stop()
106:         self.performance_optimizer.stop_monitoring()

108:     def speak(self, text: str) -> bool:
109:         """Synthétise et joue le texte"""
110:         if not text or not text.strip():
111:             return False
112:         self.interface_manager.display_message(f"Assistant: {text}")
113:         return self.audio_pipeline.speak(text)
114: 
115:     def speak_response(self, text: str) -> bool:
116:         """Alias pour speak"""
117:         return self.speak(text)
118: 
119:     def process_user_message(self, message: str) -> str:
120:         """Traite un message utilisateur"""
121:         return self.conversation_handler.process_message(message)

221:         french_patterns = [
222:             r'\b(le|la|les|un|une|des|du|de|à|et|ou|mais|si|que|qui|quoi|où|quand|comment)\b',
223:             r'\b(je|tu|il|elle|nous|vous|ils|elles)\b',
224:             r'\b(suis|es|est|sommes|êtes|sont|ai|as|a|avons|avez|ont)\b',
225:             r'\b(de|dans|sur|sous|entre|avant|après|pendant|pour|par|avec|sans)\b',
226:         ]
227:         french_word_count = 0
228:         total_words = len(text.split())
229:         if total_words == 0:
230:             return False
231:         for pattern in french_patterns:
232:             matches = re.findall(pattern, text.lower())

1440:     def _get_microphone_choices(self) -> List[str]:
1441:         try:
1442:             import pyaudio
1443:             p = pyaudio.PyAudio()
1444:             seen_names = set()
1445:             choices = []
1446:             
1447:             for i in range(min(15, p.get_device_count())):
1448:                 try:
1449:                     device_info = p.get_device_info_by_index(i)
1450:                     if device_info['maxInputChannels'] > 0:
1451:                         name = device_info['name']
1452:                         name_lower = name.lower()
1453:                         if name_lower in seen_names:
1454:                             continue
1455:                         if any(v in name_lower for v in ['virtual', 'cable', 'loopback', 'virtual audio cable']):
1456:                             continue
1457:                         seen_names.add(name_lower)
1458:                         choices.append((i, name))
1459:                 except Exception:
1460:                     continue
1461:             
1462:             p.terminate()
1463:             
1464:             if not choices:
1465:                 return ["0: Microphone par défaut"]
1466:             
1467:             return [f"{idx}: {name}" for idx, name in choices[:8]]
1468:         except Exception:
1469:             return ["0: Microphone par défaut"]

1493:     def _get_audio_output_choices(self) -> List[str]:
1494:         try:
1495:             import pyaudio
1496:             p = pyaudio.PyAudio()
1497:             filtered = []
1498:             for i in range(min(10, p.get_device_count())):
1499:                 device_info = p.get_device_info_by_index(i)
1500:                 name = device_info['name'].lower()
1501:                 if device_info['maxOutputChannels'] > 0:
1502:                     if any(v in name for v in ['virtual', 'voicemeeter', 'cable', 'loopback']):
1503:                         continue
1504:                     if any(p in name for p in ['speakers', 'headphone', 'headset', 'haut-parleurs', 'casque']):
1505:                         filtered.append((i, device_info['name']))
1506:             p.terminate()
1507:             if len(filtered) > 4:
1508:                 filtered = filtered[:4]
1509:             if len(filtered) < 2:
1510:                 filtered = [(0, "Haut-parleurs par défaut"), (1, "Casque audio")]
1511:             return [f"{idx}: {name}" for idx, name in filtered]
1512:         except Exception as e:
1513:             logger.error(f"Erreur sorties audio: {e}")
1514:             return ["0: Haut-parleurs par défaut", "1: Casque audio"]

1516:     def _get_default_microphone(self) -> str:
1517:         """Retourne le microphone par défaut avec validation."""
1518:         try:
1519:             mic = self.audio_controller.get_default_microphone()
1520:             if mic is None:
1521:                 return "0: Microphone par défaut"
1522:             
1523:             if isinstance(mic, str):
1524:                 # Valider que la valeur est dans la liste des choix
1525:                 choices = self._get_microphone_choices()
1526:                 if mic in choices:
1527:                     return mic
1528:                 else:
1529:                     # Retourner le premier choix disponible
1530:                     return choices[0] if choices else "0: Microphone par défaut"
1531:             
1532:             return f"{mic.index}: {mic.name}"
1533:         except Exception as e:
1534:             logger.debug(f"Erreur microphone par défaut: {e}")
1535:             return "0: Microphone par défaut"

1537:     def _get_default_audio_output(self) -> str:
1538:         """Return the default audio output as a string.
1539: 
1540:         The default value must be present in the list of choices; otherwise
1541:         Gradio will emit a warning.  We therefore validate the value and
1542:         fall back to the first available choice if necessary.
1543:         """
1544:         out = self.audio_controller.get_default_speaker()
1545:         default = f"{out.index}: {out.name}" if out else ""
1546:         choices = self._get_audio_output_choices()
1547:         if default not in choices:
1548:             default = choices[0] if choices else ""
1549:         return default

1826:     def _preview_prompt(self, template: str, input_text: str, variables: str, custom_vars: str) -> str:
1827:         """Génère un aperçu du prompt."""
1828:         try:
1829:             if not template:
1830:                 return "Entrez un template de prompt pour voir l'aperçu"
1831:             
1832:             custom_vars_dict = {}
1833:             if custom_vars:
1834:                 for pair in custom_vars.split(','):
1835:                     if '=' in pair:
1836:                         key, value = pair.split('=', 1)
1837:                         custom_vars_dict[key.strip()] = value.strip()
1838:             
1839:             prompt = template
1840:             prompt = prompt.replace('{input}', input_text or '[CONTENU À ANALYSER]')
1841:             
1842:             for key, value in custom_vars_dict.items():
1843:                 prompt = prompt.replace(f'{{{key}}}', value)
1844:             
1845:             return prompt
1846:             
1847:         except Exception as e:
1848:             logger.debug(f"Erreur aperçu prompt: {e}")
1849:             return f"Erreur aperçu: {str(e)}"

1852:                     temperature: float, max_tokens: int, system_message: str) -> Tuple[str, str, str]:
1853:         """Teste un prompt avec l'IA."""
1854:         try:
1855:             if not template:
1856:                 return "", "❌ Template requis", "❌ Erreur"
1857:             
1858:             generated_prompt = self._preview_prompt(template, input_text, variables, custom_vars)
1859:             
1860:             messages = [{"role": "user", "content": generated_prompt}]
1861:             if system_message:
1862:                 messages.insert(0, {"role": "system", "content": system_message})
1863:             
1864:             response = self.assistant.llm_service.generate_response(messages, temperature=temperature)
1865:             
1866:             return generated_prompt, response, "✅ Test effectué"
1867:             
1868:         except Exception as e:
1869:             logger.error(f"Erreur test prompt: {e}")
1870:             return "", f"❌ Erreur test: {str(e)}", f"❌ Erreur: {str(e)}"
